NAVAREA XIX 86/17
1. RIGLIST. CORRECT AT 061830 UTC AUG 17.
NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.
 
72-02.5N - 020-33.0E LEIV EIRIKSSON
74-04,2N - 035-48.4E SONGA ENABLER
71-17.1N - 022-17.2E SCARABEO 8
66-00.9N - 008-03.5E SONGA ENCOURAGE
65-24.0N - 007-26.2E DEEPSEA BERGEN

NOTES:
A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METER SAFETY ZONE.
B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT
WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW
2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 83/17
